New Energy Case

Heat-Sink Base Plate for a New Energy Drive Controller

controller heat dissipation / mounting surface / sealing interface

IndustriesNew Energy
Part Functioncontroller heat dissipation / mounting surface / sealing interface
Manufacturing Capabilitiesaluminum CNC machining, flatness control, surface treatment and CMM inspection

Project Scenario

The drive controller base plate required thermal contact surfaces, mounting interfaces and finishing requirements to be reviewed before machining.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivery confirmed flatness, mounting features and surface treatment requirements for controller assembly verification.
